1: And when any will offer a meat offering unto the LORD LORD , his offering shall be of of fine flour; and he shall pour oil upon it, and put frankincense thereon:
2: and he shall bring it to Aaron's sons the priests: and he shall take thereout his handful of the flour thereof, and of the oil thereof, with all the frankincense thereof; and the priest shall burn the memorial of it upon the altar, to be to be an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD LORD :
3: and the remnant of the meat offering shall be shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the LORD LORD made by fire.
4: And if thou bring an oblation of a meat offering baken in the oven, it shall be it shall be unleavened cakes of fine flour mingled with oil, or unleavened wafers anointed with oil.
5: And if thy oblation be be a meat offering baken baken in a pan, it shall be of of fine flour unleavened, mingled with oil.
6: Thou shalt part it in pieces, and pour oil thereon: it is is a meat offering.
7: And if thy oblation be be a meat offering baken baken in the fryingpan, it shall be made of of fine flour with oil.
8: And thou shalt bring the meat offering that is made of these things unto the LORD LORD : and when it is presented unto the priest, he shall bring it unto the altar.
9: And the priest shall take from the meat offering a memorial thereof, and shall burn it it upon the altar: it is it is an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD LORD .
10: And that which is left of the meat offering shall be shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the LORD LORD made by fire.
11: No meat offering, which ye shall bring unto the LORD LORD , shall be made with leaven: for ye shall burn no leaven, nor any honey, in any offering of the LORD LORD made by fire.
12: As for the oblation of the firstfruits, ye shall offer them unto the LORD LORD : but they shall not be burnt on the altar for a sweet savour.
13: And every oblation of thy meat offering shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffer the salt of the covenant of thy God to be lacking from thy meat offering: with all thine offerings thou shalt offer salt.
14: And if thou offer a meat offering of thy firstfruits unto the LORD LORD , thou shalt offer for the meat offering of thy firstfruits green ears of corn dried by the fire, even even corn beaten out of full ears.
15: And thou shalt put oil upon it, and lay frankincense thereon: it is is a meat offering.
16: And the priest shall burn the memorial of it, part part of the beaten corn thereof, and part part of the oil thereof, with all the frankincense thereof: it is it is an offering made by fire unto the LORD LORD .
